Fall '24 Workshops: Register Now
We host workshops on the campus of Northeastern University in the heart of Boston. Spring 2024 workshops are scheduled, please register now and join us!

At-Home Anytime Challenges
Can't wait for the workshops? Us either! We've created some at-home coding challenges for everyone. They are all free and beginner-friendly, and you can do them at any time, in any order!
